name: semantic_search_memory
description: Search the knowledge graph by topic. Returns ranked entities with scores. Use for: finding context on a topic, checking if something was already recorded, looking up decisions. Add --compact for token-efficient name+score results.

query.description: Natural language search query (synonyms and aliases are expanded automatically)

branch.description: Branch to boost results for (default: auto-detected from git)

compact.description: If true, return entity names + scores only (saves tokens). Default false.

name: traverse_relations
description: Follow relationships from an entity through the graph via BFS. Returns connected subgraph (nodes + edges). Use for: understanding dependencies, seeing what connects to what, exploring architecture. Use search first to find the entity name, then traverse.

entity.description: Exact entity name to start from (use search to find names first)

name: search_memory_by_time
description: Find entities by time range. Returns entities updated/created within the window, newest first. Use for: 'what changed recently?', 'what decisions were made last week?'.

branch_filter.description: Filter to entities from this branch only

entity_type.description: Filter to entities of this type (e.g. decision, component, file-warning, service)

name: create_entities
description: Create or merge entities. If an entity with the same name exists, new observations are appended (deduped) and _updated is refreshed. Use for: recording new components/services/patterns, adding file-warnings for fragile code.

entityType.description: Type: component, service, module, function, file, decision, file-warning, bug, or custom

observations.description: Facts about the entity. Each observation is a plain string.

name: create_relations
description: Create directed edges between entities. Duplicates are silently skipped. Use for: recording dependencies, call chains, ownership.

relationType.description: Relation type: uses, depends-on, extends, calls, owns, contains, decided-for, or custom

name: add_observations
description: Append new facts to an existing entity. Duplicate observations are skipped. Entity must already exist (use create_entities otherwise).

name: remove_observations
description: Remove specific observations from an entity. Non-matching observations are silently ignored.

name: delete_entities
description: Delete entities by name. Relations referencing deleted entities are cascade-removed.

name: rename_entity
description: Rename an entity and update all relation references (from/to) to use the new name.

name: create_decision
description: Record an architectural/design decision with structured rationale and alternatives. Creates a 'decision: <title>' entity with decided-for relations to affected entities. Use whenever a task involved choosing between approaches.

title.description: What was decided (e.g. 'Use PostgreSQL over MongoDB for user data')

alternatives.description: Rejected alternatives with reasons (e.g. 'MongoDB -- no multi-doc txns')

related_entities.description: Entity names this decision affects (creates decided-for relations)

name: update_decision_outcome
description: Resolve a decision: set its outcome and record what was learned. Use when returning to work affected by a prior decision, or when SessionStart shows stale pending decisions.

name: list_decisions
description: List all decisions with their outcome status. Without stale_days: newest first. With stale_days: only pending decisions older than N days, oldest first.

stale_days.description: If set, return only pending decisions older than this many days

name: graph_stats
description: Graph health: entity/relation counts, type breakdown, branch distribution, index age, top recalled entities, pending decisions, session activity. Use for diagnostics, not routine checks (SessionStart hook already shows status).
